title: justicia francoiseana
intro: Justicia francoiseana, also known as Francoise's justicia or wild jasmine, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. The leaves and stems of this plant have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Justicia francoiseana include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant protection. The plant can be prepared as an infusion or decoction, and is also used in herbal teas and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
